headers:
The dashed line ( ) in the dose counter will guide you to your dose.
The dose selector clicks differently when turned forward, backwards
or past your dose. You will hear a ‘click’ every time you turn the
dose selector. Do not set the dose by counting the number of clicks
you hear.
(See figure J).

rows.The dashed line ( ) in the dose counter:
When your prescribed dose lines up with the dose pointer, you
have selected your dose. In this picture, the dose 0.25 mg is
shown as an example.
If the dose counter stops before you reach your prescribed dose, see
the section ‘Do you have enough Wegovy?’ below these
instructions.
(See figure K).

Choose your injection site
Choose your upper arms, upper legs or stomach (keep a 5 cm
distance from your belly button).
You may inject in the same body area each week, but make sure it is
not in the same spot as used the last time.
